About Dimensions

We provide you Sustainable Future of energy

Solar power is the key to a clean energy future. Every day, the sun gives off far more energy than we need to power everything on earth. That’s why you should be investing heavily in solar plants and our company ‘Dimensions’ is here provide you with the best and efficient solar plants.

 

Solar energy is that produced by the Sun’s light – photovoltaic energy – and its warmth – solar thermal – for the generation of electricity or the production of heat. Inexhaustible and renewable, since it comes from the Sun, solar energy is harnessed using panels.

Read More
Our Product

We Are Here To Give You The Best Solar Panel For Your Premises

Solar Plants are used to harness Sun's Energy to produce Electricity out of it. Using solar power will also help reduce your carbon emissions, which have an impact on climate change and contribute to worsening natural disasters.

  • Working with the top ten companies of the world of solar plants.
  • Considering the inverters on the basis of best performance, out put & best after sales services.
  • For other components like structure, walkway, etc we consider only the best quality
Why Choose Us

We ensure you Earn more From your SOLAR PLANT

We are having experience of more than 11 years and 8000 KWP+ Roof Top. We provide complete turn key solution for domestic, commercial and industrial solar plants.

Our Mission

Our Mission is protect nature by meeting the requirement of renewable source of energy euipment as well as provide best return on investment to our valuable customers.

Our Vision

We at DIMENSIONS are making little efforts to promote the usage of reneable source of energy to the society. We have incorporated in 2010 with a vision to provide turn key Solar plant solutions.
